scenarios.name: entries are sealed until reveal: each member sees only their own until the capsule is revealed, then everyone sees all

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_time_capsule__capsules (id, title, reveal_date, status, created_by_id, created_by_name, created_at) VALUES ('cap1', 'Class of 2036', '2036-06-01', 'closed', ?, 'A', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')

INSERT INTO app_time_capsule__entries (id, capsule_id, member_id, member_name, entry_type, title, body, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('e_a', 'cap1', ?, 'A', 'letter', 'From A', 'a body', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z'), ('e_b', 'cap1', ?, 'B', 'prediction', 'From B', 'b body', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z'), ('e_c', 'cap1', ?, 'C', 'memory', 'From C', 'c body', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')
SELECT id, member_id FROM app_time_capsule__entries WHERE capsule_id = ?
SELECT id FROM app_time_capsule__entries WHERE capsule_id = ?
SELECT id, body FROM app_time_capsule__entries WHERE capsule_id = ? AND member_id = ?
UPDATE app_time_capsule__capsules SET status = 'revealed', revealed_at = '2036-06-01T00:00:00Z' WHERE id = 'cap1'
SELECT id FROM app_time_capsule__entries WHERE capsule_id = ?

scenarios.name: sealing on insert forces authorship, and once the capsule is closed entries are frozen against new writes

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_time_capsule__capsules (id, title, reveal_date, status, created_by_id, created_by_name, created_at) VALUES ('cap1', 'Open Capsule', '2036-06-01', 'open', ?, 'A', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')

INSERT INTO app_time_capsule__entries (id, capsule_id, member_id, member_name, entry_type, title, body, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('e1', 'cap1', ?, 'A', 'letter', 't', 'original body', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')
SELECT member_id FROM app_time_capsule__entries WHERE id = 'e1'
UPDATE app_time_capsule__capsules SET status = 'closed', closed_at = '2026-02-01T00:00:00Z' WHERE id = 'cap1'

INSERT INTO app_time_capsule__entries (id, capsule_id, member_id, member_name, entry_type, title, body, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('e2', 'cap1', ?, 'A', 'letter', 't', 'late', '2026-02-02T00:00:00Z', '2026-02-02T00:00:00Z')
UPDATE app_time_capsule__entries SET body = 'edited after close' WHERE id = 'e1'
SELECT body FROM app_time_capsule__entries WHERE id = 'e1'
